## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that causes existing behavior to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI / build system change

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the naming and style conventions in the project (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have added type annotations — `mypy` passes with zero errors
- [ ] I have added or updated tests for any changed behavior
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`make test`)
- [ ] Lint and format checks pass (`make lint`)
- [ ] I have updated CHANGELOG.md under the Unreleased section
- [ ] I have added docstrings to all new public functions and classes
- [ ] All tool return values are structured JSON dicts (no plain strings)
- [ ] Error responses include a `suggestion` field
